channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Investigation Underway in Bhopal Dowry Death of Noida Woman Following CCTV Footage
item.description: Fresh CCTV footage has emerged in the case of a 33-year-old Noida woman found dead at her marital home in Bhopal's Katara Hills area on May 12. The videos show the woman climbing the staircase, and la...

item.title: Trump postpones planned U.S. military strike on Iran citing ongoing negotiations
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on Monday that he has called off a planned military strike against Iran that was scheduled for Tuesday. The decision comes as serious negotiations are reportedly ...

item.title: CBS News Leadership May Shift Amid Controversy Over Bari Weiss' Management
item.description: Bari Weiss, a conservative-leaning journalist, has faced significant challenges since taking the helm at CBS News, with low ratings and a series of controversies marking her tenure. Despite support fr...

item.title: Kenya's Creator Economy Expands Commercially Amid Monetisation Challenges
item.description: The creator economy in Kenya is taking a major leap from casual content-making to becoming a formal business sector. At the International Creator Day and Click Awards 2026 held at the University of Na...

item.title: South Africa Expresses Interest to Host 2026 WBC Boxing Convention
item.description: Boxing South Africa (SA) has formally expressed interest in hosting the 64th World Boxing Council (WBC) Annual Convention next year. This comes amid uncertainty over the current venue in Abu Dhabi, Un...

item.title: Dela Rosa Seeks Court Injunction Against ICC Arrest Warrant
item.description: Former Philippine Police Chief and Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa has reaffirmed his intent to secure a Temporary Restraining Order (TRO) to halt the enforcement of an arrest warrant issued by the In...

item.title: The Enduring Legacy of Michael Chanda, Master Milliner
item.description: Michael Chanda (1920–2004), a Czechoslovakia-born milliner who grew up in the United States, became a prominent figure in mid-20th-century fashion through his innovative approach to hat design. After ...

item.title: Examining Compulsory Voting: Lessons from Australia for New Zealand
item.description: New Zealand faces a decline in voter turnout despite high enrolment rates, with only 77.5% of enrolled voters casting a ballot in the 2023 general election. Participation is particularly low among you...

item.title: West Bengal Police Reopens Old Cases and Registers New FIRs Over 2021 Post-Poll Violence
item.description: The West Bengal government has intensified its efforts to address incidents of violence and corruption following the 2021 Assembly elections. According to a statement from the West Bengal police on Ma...

item.title: Ella Langley Dominates ACM Awards 2026; Cody Johnson Wins Entertainer of the Year
item.description: The 2026 Academy of Country Music Awards, held at the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas and hosted by Shania Twain, celebrated the biggest names in country music. The night was dominated by rising s...

item.title: Lok Sabha Panel Submits Report on Justice Yashwant Varma Following Resignation
item.description: A three-member inquiry panel, set up by Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla, has submitted its report on Justice Yashwant Varma amid allegations of unaccounted cash discovered at his official residence in Delh...

item.title: ¡Forward, Russia! announce 2027 UK tour and 20th anniversary vinyl reissue of debut album
item.description: Leeds indie band ¡Forward, Russia! are set to reunite for a UK tour in February 2027 to mark the 20th anniversary of their debut album 'Give Me A Wall'. This will be their first live performances in o...

item.title: San Diego Islamic Centre Shooting Results in Five Deaths, Including Suspects
item.description: On 18 May 2026, an active shooter incident occurred at the Islamic Centre of San Diego, located in the Clairemont neighbourhood. The San Diego Police Department reported that the threat had been neutr...

item.title: Calgary Hosts Inclusive Fun Day for Children with Special Needs
item.description: In Calgary, children with special needs were treated to a day of activities and entertainment designed to celebrate their abilities and provide a welcoming environment for families. Organizers arrange...

item.title: Iranian Parliament Considers Large Bounties on Trump and Netanyahu Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Iran's parliament is reportedly considering a bill that would authorise a £43.5 million reward for anyone who assassinates former US President Donald Trump or Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu...

item.title: Atlantic columnist questions media scrutiny of Trump's age compared to Biden
item.description: An article in The Atlantic, highlighted by Fox News, claims that President Donald Trump's age and stamina are not receiving the same level of scrutiny that former President Joe Biden faced. Jonathan L...

item.title: Crichton Aims to Bounce Back for NSW Despite Recent Form Dip
item.description: Stephen Crichton, the Canterbury Bulldogs captain, is preparing for State of Origin I despite struggling with form after a severe shoulder injury in round five. The grade-five AC joint injury sideline...

item.title: Western Cape dam levels rise above 70% amid storm recovery efforts
item.description: Following a series of severe storms earlier this month, dam levels across the Western Cape have risen sharply to over 70%, up from 52.46% last week. The province faced heavy rainfall between 150mm and...

item.title: US Congress links Trump to efforts protecting Nigerian Christians from extremist attacks
item.description: US Congressman Riley Moore don yarn say President Donald Trump dey put serious mind on the protection of Christians for Nigeria, especially after dem carry out joint operation wey kill ISIS big man, A...

item.title: Former British soldier imprisoned in Russia expresses feelings of neglect and lack of support
item.description: Hayden Davies, a former British soldier, has been sentenced to 15 years in a Russian maximum-security prison after being captured in Ukraine while serving in the Ukrainian army's foreign legion. Convi...
